# Phase 2: Infrastructure - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-01
**Status:** Ready for planning

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Build the LangGraph orchestration skeleton and artifact store — the runtime foundation all agents plug into. LangGraph graph with 7 agent stub nodes + 4 phase gate nodes must run end-to-end on synthetic input. Routing logic unit tests pass. Artifact store read/write/list API works with typed agent output schemas.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Claude's Discretion
All implementation decisions deferred to Claude's judgment.
/gsd:drive auto-generated this context — no user discussion occurred.

Key context from spec:
- LangGraph ≥0.2 with typed StateGraph, conditional edges, HITL checkpoints
- Four pipeline phases: Discovery → Definition → Pitch & Evaluation → Handoff
- Orchestrator = root node, 6 workers = leaf nodes
- Artifact store: filesystem-based initially; agents write to named directories; read via reference
- Pydantic v2 for all state types (already defined in Phase 1)
- Stub nodes only in this phase — no LLM calls

</decisions>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

- Agent artifact models from `src/schemas/agent_artifacts.py` define node input/output types
- HandoffPackage from `src/schemas/handoff_package.py` is the terminal output
- Gate nodes are conditional edges that check artifact completeness before phase advance

</specifics>
